headline: Barclays Downgrades Equity Residential to Equal-Weight, Maintains Price Target to $76
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   downgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and maintains the price target from $76 to $76.

raw.headline: Barclays Downgrades Equity Residential to Equal-Weight, Maintains Price Target to $76
raw.summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   downgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and maintains the price target from $76 to $76.
